changes.value: When opening a board, the main window always switches to it because it follows the backend's is_active flag. The focused window should be the one that switches. Need to scope board-changed handling to only follow active board in the window that is focused.
Opening a board switches the first window instead of the focused window

 title: Opening a board switches the first window instead of the focused window
 ---
 When opening a board, the main window always switches to it because it follows the backend's is_active flag. The focused window should be the one that switches. Need to scope board-changed handling to only follow active board in the window that is focused.
